arts.ttl: Bromley boss Andy Woodman delighted at Newcastle United draw in FA Cup
arts.sum: Bromley manager Andy Woodman always had a feeling his side would land ex-employers Newcastle United in the third round FA Cup draw. We have a real catalogue of players that we have taken since my time here that have gone on to do really good things.

arts.ttl: Man City target Wirtz & Guimaraes - Saturday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester City identify Florian Wirtz and Bruno Guimaraes as targets, Chelsea and Liverpool are interested in Milos Kerkez, and is Dusan Vlahovic heading to Arsenal in January?

arts.ttl: Ben Chiwell Chelsea nightmare after Leicester City transfer as exit almost done
arts.sum: Former Leicester City boss Enzo Maresca continued his remarkable start to life at Chelsea on Thursday as the Blues secured their spot in the last 16 of the Conference League. Maresca has inherited a huge squad in the capital with certain players, including ex-Leicester man Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall, falling into the crop of players who predominantly play outside of the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Newcastle as Hamza Choudhury makes rare start amid three changes
arts.sum: Instead, it’s Stephy Mavididi who comes in, the winger handed his first start under van Nistelrooy, with Buonanotte only among the substitutes. Hamza Choudhury has been handed his first Premier League start of the season with Harry Winks unable to prove his fitness for Leicester City’s trip to Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Everton - Premier League 3pms: Live score, team news and updates as the Gunners host Sean Dyche's Toffees at the Emirates plus updates from the other games including Liverpool vs Fulham
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest team news, updates and live score from the 3pm Premier League meetings including Arsenal vs Everton and Liverpool vs Fulham

arts.ttl: Newcastle midfielder in his prime looking for MLS switch
arts.sum: Newcastle United have hardly spent money in the last two transfer windows. In January last year, they struggled to strengthen their squad and same was the case in the summer transfer window when they desperately wanted new players but could not spend money because of Profit and Sustainability Rules. The Magpies could face the same […] The post Newcastle midfielder in his prime looking for MLS switch appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy outlines which Leicester City players he won't overcoach
arts.sum: Play with heart and not with the head is the request from Ruud van Nistelrooy to Leicester City’s attacking talents. City have netted five times in van Nistelrooy’s two games in charge and they now rank 12th in the Premier League for goals scored this season.

arts.ttl: Tottenham and Newcastle have same player ‘on top of list’ – Transfer won’t be entertained for ‘less than €30m’
arts.sum: Two months ago, we covered claims from France which stated Newcastle United are chasing Abdukodir Khusanov. Earlier this month, Le10 Sport reported Tottenham Hotspur are in the picture for the RC Lens player. Saturday’s edition of La Voix du Nord mentions Tottenham and Newcastle interest when discussing the 20-year-old’s growth at the Ligue 1 side. The post Tottenham and Newcastle have same player ‘on top of list’ – Transfer won’t be entertained for ‘less than €30m’ appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Mbeumo and Cunha pursuits backed as Newcastle United transfer verdict delivered
arts.sum: My view on this matter has not changed since the summer - above all else Newcastle United MUST ensure their next big money signing plays on the right wing. However, bringing in a natural, quality option on the right who could chip in would give Newcastle a new dimension, ease the burden on Alexander Isak and Anthony Gordon and give the group a much-needed shot in the arm.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's £715m Premier League mission after breathtaking Manchester City announcement
arts.sum: Even head coach Eddie Howe finds himself keeping up to date with Newcastle's commercial activities and told Chronicle Live last week: "I think our revenue streams aren't where we want them to be. Newcastle United saw the revenue bar raised even higher when it comes to football's finance ladder after Manchester City's new accounts showed an incredible £715m - a new Premier League record.
